query:
INSERT INTO userNftInventory (userId, performerId, tokenId, contractAddress)
SELECT 1, id, CONCAT('0x', LPAD(HEX(id), 64, '0')), '0x1234567890123456789012345678901234567890'
FROM performers
LIMIT 10;
